data.title: Ontex earns 'A' rating for 2nd year in a row from CDP for climate change transparency.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Aalst, Belgium, Ontex Group NV, listed on Euronext under the symbol ONTEX, has been awarded an 'A' rating by CDP for the second consecutive year. The company, renowned for its personal care solutions, has been recognized by the global environmental non-profit for its exceptional corporate transparency and effectiveness in addressing climate change. This recognition highlights Ontex's commitment to sustainability and marks a significant achievement for the company.

data.title: Earnings per share outlook for 2025 raised to c. DKK 85 due to a clerical error in the financial table.
data.description: An error has been identified in the financial table, where "Q4 2025" mistakenly appeared as "Q4 2024." This correction addresses the issue with the quarter figure for the respective year, highlighting the revised time frame for the financial data. The correction ensures accurate representation in the financial records.
#ROCKWOOL A/S makes transactions related to share buy-back program. #stocks #finance

data.title: France identifies 90 unlicensed crypto firms pre-MiCA deadline. 40% won't apply, 30% unresponsive amid regulator warnings for July closures.
data.description: In France, there are a total of 90 cryptocurrency businesses registered without a MiCA license. Among them, 40% have chosen not to pursue the license, while 30% have not responded to regulators. Authorities have issued warnings about potential shutdowns in July for those operating without the required license.

data.title: Sobi to release Q4 and FY 2025 report on Feb 5, 2026, at 08:00 CET; Conference call at 13:00 CET on the same day.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Sobi announced its intention to release the financial report for the fourth quarter and entire year of 2025 on February 5, 2026, at 08:00 CET. Stakeholders including investors, analysts, and the media are encouraged to join the conference call scheduled for the same day at 13:00 CET, 12:00 GMT, and 07:00 EST. The call will provide insights on the company's performance and outlook moving forward.

data.title: Meta's 1,000 job cuts in Reality Labs pivot towards AI wearables and mobile; amidst broader tech layoffs.
data.description: Around 1,000 positions are being eliminated in Reality Labs as Meta shifts resources away from the metaverse towards AI wearables and mobile products.

data.title: U.S. stock futures fall; 2.7% rise in CPI; Supreme Court to rule on Trump's tariff authority; Dow -0.15%, S&P 500 -0.16%, Nasdaq 100 -0.16%. Wells Fargo & BP in focus.
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell on Wednesday after previous day's decline, with major benchmark indices also down. Consumer Price Index rose by 2.7% year over year in December, matching expectations. Core CPI came in at 2.6% year over year, slightly below predictions. Investors await Supreme Court's opinion release on challenge to Trump's tariff authority. 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.17% and 2-year bond yielded 3.52%. Fed likely to keep interest rates unchanged in January with a 97.2% probability according to CME Group's FedWatch tool. Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq 100 were all down, while Russell 2000 saw a slight increase. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were lower in premarket trading. Wells Fargo expected to report earnings with projections of $1.67 per share on revenue of $21.65 billion. BP PLC dropped 1.84% after announcing its energy-related news.

data.title: California Community Foundation released a report on LA wildfires, impacting families and communities on Jan 7, 2025.
data.description: On January 7, 2025, Los Angeles County was hit by catastrophic wildfires, causing immediate and profound devastation to families and communities. In response, the California Community Foundation (CCF) promptly activated its Wildfire Recovery initiative.

data.title: Study identifies blood signature for predicting type 2 diabetes risk, offering insights from genetics, diet, lifestyle.
data.description: Scientists from Mass General Brigham and Albert Einstein College of Medicine have pinpointed molecular alterations linked to the risk of type 2 diabetes. This research highlights the impact of genetics, dietary choices, and lifestyle habits on the development of the disease. These findings offer valuable insights that may lead to enhanced strategies for preventing and treating type 2 diabetes.

data.title: Clinical trial shows Seed's DS-01® improves digestive health, reducing bloating and enhancing quality of life. #1 probiotic in U.S.
data.description: New clinical research published in Nutrients showcases the strong clinical standards supporting DS-01®'s status as the leading digestive health probiotic in the United States. Seed Health, a microbiome science company based in Los Angeles, revealed these findings on Jan. 14, 2026. The study highlights the effectiveness of DS-01® and solidifies its position as a top choice for digestive health, solidifying its reputation in the market.

data.title: Meaco receives multi-million-pound investment from FourLeaf Capital to boost European growth.
data.description: In London on January 14, 2026, Meaco, a prominent air treatment specialist in the UK specializing in home comfort solutions, has successfully obtained a substantial multi-million-pound investment from FourLeaf Capital. This investment signifies a critical milestone in Meaco's path to expansion and development.

data.title: EARTHDAY.ORG declares global theme for Earth Day 2026: "Our Power, Our Planet" - aims to empower people worldwide.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, EARTHDAY.ORG unveiled the global theme for Earth Day 2026 as "Our Power, Our Planet," urging individuals worldwide to assert their voice, rights, and future. The initiative, in collaboration with various partners, aims to empower people in advocating for environmental conservation. This year's Earth Day theme emphasizes the need for collective action to address pressing environmental issues. Stay tuned for upcoming events and initiatives to participate in the movement towards a sustainable future.

data.title: AiSentr announces Phil Fitzgerald as Chief Revenue Officer, with over 30 years of experience. London-based no-code software platform aims for efficiency and productivity at scale.
data.description: On January 14th, 2026, AiSentr, a no-code, agentic software platform located in London, revealed the addition of Phil Fitzgerald as their new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). With more than three decades of experience, Fitzgerald is expected to enhance the company’s operational efficiency and productivity on a large scale.

data.title: New study by NPG challenges notion that GDP growth leads to prosperity for Americans - research by Dr. Nathanial Gronewold.
data.description: The recently published Forum paper by Negative Population Growth, Inc. (NPG) in Alexandria, Va., on Jan. 14, 2026, challenges the notion that GDP growth is improving the lives of Americans. The paper, titled "The Myth of Growth-Driven Prosperity" and written by Nathanial Gronewold, Ph.D., highlights this issue. This thought-provoking paper raises questions about the impact of economic growth on society. It delves into the idea that despite GDP growth, many Americans are not experiencing an increase in their quality of life. This analysis presents a crucial perspective on the disconnect between economic indicators and the well-being of the population. Addressing a key concern facing the nation, the paper calls for a deeper examination of how economic growth truly benefits individuals.
